sourceCues.text: Most agent tasks fail before the agent starts.
Help with the launch names an activity, not an outcome.
Give the agent one concrete artifact: Draft a review-ready launch brief.
Then add the source materials that may change the answer, the hard constraints it cannot cross, and the evidence a reviewer must see.
Now the agent knows what done looks like, what it may use, and when to stop.
Tiny rule: artifact, context, constraints, review bar.
That turns a vague prompt into an executable task.
Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
